## What problem are you trying to solve

<!-- The use case. What command did you want to run? What got in the way? -->

## What would the UX look like

```
$ patchrun --your-flag ...
```

## Why does this belong in patchrun (and not in your command)

<!-- patchrun's scope is small. Features that improve the
"run-a-command-as-a-patch" workflow are in scope; features that turn patchrun
into a sandbox / orchestrator / agent platform are not. -->
